summary: Completed testing of subscription expiry read-only mode feature. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend banner verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test therapist (mobile: 1234567890). Toggled subscription_status between trial/active/expired/cancelled for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription expiry read-only mode feature fully tested and working: 1) Login works for all subscription statuses (trial, active, expired, cancelled). 2) GET /api/auth/subscription-status returns is_read_only: true for expired/cancelled, false for trial/active. 3) READ operations (GET /api/clients, GET /api/session-notes, GET /api/appointments) work for expired therapists. 4) WRITE operations (POST /api/clients, POST /api/appointments, POST /api/session-notes, POST /api/messages) blocked with 403 for expired therapists. 5) Frontend shows persistent yellow banner with warning icon for expired subscription. 6) Banner includes 'Contact Support' button. 7) No banner shown for trial/active subscriptions.

frontend_banner.banner_shows_for_expired: PASS - Yellow banner with warning icon visible
frontend_banner.banner_text: Your subscription has expired. You are currently in read-only mode.
